summary: RETEST iteration 9 — Both blocking backend bugs from iteration_8 are FIXED and verified. (1) File category whitelist extended (server.py ~L1002-1008): all 9 categories (3 legacy + 6 new) now persist correctly through POST /api/projects/{pid}/files. (2) customer_materials defaulted to [] on create_project (~L804-805) + on_startup backfill (~L345-346): POST /api/projects/{pid}/materials now returns 200 and persists. Full end-to-end round-trip gate test executed and PASSED — entry→design→procurement→manufacturing→testing→shipping→archived, with all 5 gates (approval_drawing for design→procurement, materials supplied for procurement→manufacturing, product_photo+inspection_report for testing→shipping, as_built_drawing for shipping→archived) all returning 409 when unmet and 200 when satisfied. Customer portal frontend flow verified end-to-end: provisioned customer logs into /admin/login → redirects to /portal → sees project list, 7-stage stepper (项目录入→已归档), customer_welcome notification, file list grouped by category, logout works. All 10 pytest cases pass (7 from iteration_8 + 3 new: full_roundtrip + regression + legitimate_project_preserved). Final cleanup verified: 0 test artefacts remain; the legitimate project 5b138ec0... is at status='manufacturing', customer_materials=[], files=[], customer_email=None.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix #1 (file categories) correctly uses an ALLOWED_FILE_CATEGORIES tuple including all 9 canonical values; the coercion fallback is preserved as a safety net rather than removed. Acceptable but could be tightened by replacing Form() with Literal[...] in the signature to 422 on truly bad input instead of silently coercing to 'drawing'.

Fix #2 (customer_materials null) is the correct two-layer fix: defensive default in create_project + idempotent on_startup backfill. The PATCH /api/projects/{pid} endpoint at line 822 still strips None values (`if v is not None`), so admins cannot null-out customer_email or customer_user_id via API — required raw Mongo $unset to detach the test customer at cleanup. Consider exposing a way to clear these fields explicitly (e.g., empty-string handling or a dedicated detach endpoint), though not urgent.

Round-trip gate logic (validate_stage_requirements + approve_status_advance) is correct end-to-end after the two fixes. Notification persistence + customer auto-provisioning + login + project scoping continue to work as expected.

Customer portal UI (CustomerPortal.jsx) renders stepper, notifications, file groups, and logout correctly. UI labels are bilingual (CN default). No interaction or contrast issues found in the smoke test.
test_credentials: admin/Topchampion (verified). Customer accounts used in tests: TEST_R8_provision (auto-cleaned by fixture), test_portal_user@example.com (manually cleaned via DELETE /api/users/{id}). No leftover users.
seed_data_creation: TEST_R9_roundtrip project (created+cleaned by module fixture), TEST_R8_phase11/TEST_R8_gates/TEST_R8_provision/TEST_R8_noemail (all auto-cleaned). The legitimate project 5b138ec0-f769-418f-ad83-87fbdca01d99 (name='1') was restored via Mongo $unset to status='manufacturing', customer_materials=[], files=[], customer_email=None, customer_user_id=None — matching user spec.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 11 functionality verified working. Two pytest suites cover the full workflow: test_iteration8.py (7 cases incl. migration/categories/gates/materials/customer/notifications/dashboard) + test_iteration9_roundtrip.py (3 cases incl. full 7-stage round-trip with every gate). Run both for regression. Note: PATCH /api/projects strips None values, so to detach a customer from a project, you must either use raw Mongo or extend the API (low priority enhancement, not blocking).
rca_of_the_issue: Both bugs from iteration_8 had clear root causes and clean fixes. Bug #1 RCA: server.py was downgrading any non-legacy category to 'drawing' — fix extended the whitelist to all 9 valid categories. Bug #2 RCA: Mongo $push fails on null fields (vs missing) — fix initialised the field to [] at creation time and backfilled existing null entries on startup. Both verified passing via pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration8.py (7/7) plus the new /app/backend/tests/test_iteration9_roundtrip.py (3/3) which exercises every single gate in the full 7-stage lifecycle. Frontend customer portal verified via playwright: login redirect, stepper render, notifications, files section, logout — all working.
